title: Summoner Scrolls
body:
![Summoner Scrolls Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/646bca39837948c6f77edad8546c22d75dc57ba0.png)
# Summoner Scrolls 

Is a small mod that adds a new range of Scrolls, which function similarly to Enchanted Books in that applying them to a tool on an Anvil gives that tool the right-click capacity to Summon a mob, at the cost of XP Levels.
They can be upgraded into their stronger variants via merging them with Enhancement Scrolls in an Anvil, too!

Summons available include:
- Zombie
  - Can be enhanced into a Husk
- Skeleton
   - Can be enhanced into a Stray
- Spider
  - Can be enhanced into 3 Cave Spiders
  - Can be fused with a Skeleton Scroll into a Spider Jockey
- Creeper
  - Can be enhanced into a Charged Creeper
- Enderman
  - Can be enhanced into a Shulkerman
- Piglin
  - Can be enhanced into a Piglin Brute
- Iron Golem
- 5 Bees

Scrolls can also be used independent of a tool if you wish to do that, but with limited durability.
All Scrolls are found in loot chests.

Hope you enjoy the mod!
